div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Phase 2: Verification per Property (CP06–CP16)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WARMS Evaluation → Irrigation / Storing / Forestation
Spatial Info → SateliteImage / Property
Supportive Info → FileMaster
Property & Source Eval → Property / PropertyOwner / WaterSource
Additional Info → Authorisation / Entitlement
GIS Analysis → FieldAndCrop / DamCalculation
SAPWAT → FieldAndCrop.SAPWATCalculationResult
ELU → Irrigation (9 scenarios) / Entitlement
Dam Volumes → DamCalculation / Storing
SFRA → Forestation

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p: Phase 1: Project Inception (CP01–CP05)

span.p:

Inception Report + Public Participation 1
